title: justicia albiflora
intro: Justicia albiflora, also known as White-flowered Justicia, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Justicia albiflora include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant and immune system support. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in teas, tinctures, or capsules for various health benefits.
